name: Akari the Lightbringer
dialogue: Wisdom. The fifth and final pillar.
Light reveals truth. Spirit endures beyond the body. And mirrors… mirrors show you who you really are.
If you’ve made it this far, you’re ready for the question: are you tuff enough?
preBattleLine: Akari opens her eyes. The room fills with blinding light.
postDefeatDialogue: Akari closes her eyes. The light fades to warmth.
You answered the question. Master Kenji waits in the inner sanctum.
Five pillars. One challenger. This is your moment.
